title: cyclosorus eurostotrichus
intro: Cyclosorus eurostotrichus, also known as the Eurasian Cystopteris, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Woodsiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus eurostotrichus include its ability to soothe and calm the respiratory system, reducing coughs and congestion. Herbal preparations of this fern are often made by infusing the leaves in hot water, creating a tea that can be used to treat respiratory conditions.
